Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 ii 

Tips on Navigating the Codebook 

This document is a detailed codebook that describes each variable in the Medicare Beneficiary Summary File (MBSF) 
— 27 CCW Chronic Condition (CC) research files. The guide includes several ways for users to quickly find the 
information they need: 

• A complete listing of all variables in the files, in alphabetical order based
